allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./questions/1.json'\); console.log\('valid JSON, questions:', d.questions.length\); console.log\('q1 hint format:', d.questions[0].hint.format, '| sections:', d.questions[0].hint.sections.length\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./questions/1.json'\); const q1=d.questions[0]; console.log\('q1 media:', q1.media===undefined?'removed \(good\)':JSON.stringify\(q1.media\)\); console.log\('q1 hint sections:', q1.hint.sections.length\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./questions/1.json'\); console.log\('valid JSON | questions:', d.questions.length\); d.questions.forEach\(q=>{const h=q.hint; const fmt=h&&h.format==='lesson'?\('lesson\('+h.sections.length+'\)'\):'LEGACY/none'; console.log\(' ', q.code.padEnd\(12\), fmt.padEnd\(12\), 'media:', q.media?q.media.type:'-'\);}\);")

PowerShell(try { Remove-Item -LiteralPath "C:\\tmp\\web_game_timer" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "DELETED OK" } catch { "FAILED: " + $_.Exception.Message }; "--- does it still exist? ---"; Test-Path "C:\\tmp\\web_game_timer")
